query: (cat:cs.RO OR cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.CV OR cat:cs.LG OR cat:cs.CL OR cat:cs.MA OR cat:cs.HC OR cat:stat.ML OR cat:eess.SY OR cat:eess.IV) AND submittedDate:[202605250000 TO 202605252359]

papers.title: When Does LeJEPA Learn a World Model?
papers.summary: A representation that scrambles the true degrees of freedom of the world cannot support reliable planning or compositional generalization. We prove that LeJEPA (alignment plus Gaussian regularization) linearly recovers the world's latent variables from nonlinear observations, a property known as linear identifiability, in a broad class of worlds where latents evolve under stationary, additive-noise transitions. Our main result is that among all such worlds, the Gaussian is the unique latent distribution for which this guarantee holds. The forward direction rests on a spectral decomposition in which each degree of nonlinearity is strictly penalized by alignment, making the linear map the optimum; the converse rules out every non-Gaussian alternative. We further prove an approximate identifiability result where the guarantee degrades gracefully, and show that linear, orthogonal identifiability enables optimal latent-space planning. We validate the theory with experiments ranging from 2D examples to 1024-dimensional latents, including distributional ablations and pixel-based robotic control. Our theory turns an empirically successful recipe into a mathematical guarantee, providing the foundation for building World Models that provably recover the structure of the world.
papers.title_zh: LeJEPA什么时候学习世界模型？
papers.summary_zh: 扰乱世界真实自由度的表示无法支持可靠的规划或组合概括。我们证明，LeJEPA（对齐加高斯正则化）可以从非线性观测中线性恢复世界的潜在变量，这种属性被称为线性可识别性，在一个广泛的世界中，潜在变量在平稳的加性噪声​​转换下演化。我们的主要结果是，在所有这样的世界中，高斯分布是这种保证成立的唯一潜在分布。前向依赖于谱分解，其中每个非线性度都通过对准严格惩罚，使线性映射成为最佳；反之则排除所有非高斯替代方案。我们进一步证明了保证优雅降级的近似可识别性结果，并表明线性、正交可识别性可以实现最佳的潜在空间规划。我们通过从 2D 示例到 1024 维潜在样本的实验验证了该理论，包括分布式消融和基于像素的机器人控制。我们的理论将经验上成功的秘诀转化为数学保证，为构建可证明恢复世界结构的世界模型提供了基础。

papers.title: Robust Tracking of Curvature-Constrained Paths for Uncertain Dubins Systems
papers.summary: This paper presents a robust tracking controller for tracking curvature-constrained paths by vehicles/robots with uncertain Dubins dynamics. Although Dubins paths have been widely used in vehicular and robotic applications, robust and convergent tracking under model uncertainties remains understudied. To address this, we propose path tracking controllers based on sliding mode control, formulated in the transverse coordinate frame, which guarantee invariance and convergence of both lateral and heading errors to zero in the presence of bounded disturbances. Simulation results show that the proposed method reliably tracks paths despite disturbances and significantly outperforms existing methods based on sliding mode controllers.
papers.comment: 6 pages, 3 figures. Accepted to IFAC World Congress 2026
papers.title_zh: 不确定杜宾斯系统曲率约束路径的鲁棒跟踪
papers.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的跟踪控制器，用于跟踪具有不确定杜宾斯动力学的车辆/机器人的曲率约束路径。尽管杜宾斯路径已广泛应用于车辆和机器人应用中，但模型不确定性下的稳健和收敛跟踪仍然没有得到充分研究。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了基于滑模控制的路径跟踪控制器，在横向坐标系中制定，保证在存在有界干扰的情况下横向和航向误差的不变性和收敛性为零。仿真结果表明，该方法在存在干扰的情况下仍能可靠地跟踪路径，并且显着优于基于滑模控制器的现有方法。

papers.title: Deterministic and Nonblocking Supervisory Control of Discrete Event Systems under Cyber Attacks
papers.summary: We investigate deterministic and nonblocking supervisory control of discrete event systems under cyber-attacks using the ALTER (Attack Language for Transition-basEd Replacement) model. While prior works consider supervisory control that achieves either the large (upper bound) language or small (lower bound) language separately, deterministic supervisory control achieves both large language and small language at the same time to ensure that the language generated by the supervised system is unique and deterministic. We introduce two new concepts of CA-D-controllability and CA-D-observability and prove that they are necessary and sufficient for the existence of a deterministic supervisor. For nonblocking supervisory control, the objective is to ensure that the supervised system can always reach marked states under any attack scenario. We prove that relative closure, CA-D-controllability, and CA-D-observability together are necessary and sufficient for the existence of a nonblocking supervisor. We further develop methods to verify CA-D-controllability and CA-D-observability. We also illustrate our results using a robotic system example.
papers.title_zh: 网络攻击下离散事件系统的确定性和非阻塞监控
papers.summary_zh: 我们使用 ALTER（基于转换的替换的攻击语言）模型研究网络攻击下离散事件系统的确定性和非阻塞监督控制。虽然先前的工作考虑分别实现大（上限）语言或小（下限）语言的监督控制，但确定性监督控制同时实现大语言和小语言，以确保监督系统生成的语言是唯一的和确定性的。我们引入了 CA-D-可控性和 CA-D-可观测性两个新概念，并证明它们对于确定性监督者的存在是必要和充分的。对于非阻塞监督控制，目标是确保受监督系统在任何攻击场景下始终能够达到标记状态。我们证明相对封闭性、CA-D-可控性和 CA-D-可观察性对于非阻塞监控器的存在是必要且充分的。我们进一步开发验证 CA-D-可控性和 CA-D-可观测性的方法。我们还使用机器人系统示例来说明我们的结果。

papers.title: Justice-informed Planning of Intermodal Autonomous Mobility-on-Demand Systems under Operational Constraints
papers.summary: To date, most of the research on transport planning has focused on optimizing revenues or utilitarian metrics such as average travel times, which often ends up penalizing the worst-off for the sake of profit or efficiency. At the same time, most of the research in transport justice has focused on assessing injustices, without being able to prescribe operational solutions. This paper contributes to bridging this gap and presents optimization models for justice-informed operational planning of intermodal mobility systems that explicitly account for the budget and safety limitations of users, and for infrastructural capacity constraints. Specifically, we first focus on an intermodal Autonomous Mobility-on-Demand (AMoD) system -- where self-driving robotaxis provide on-demand mobility jointly with public transit and active modes -- and characterize its operations from a mesoscopic planning perspective via network flow models. Second, we leverage these models to optimize system operations through both utilitarian efficiency and justice-informed objectives. We showcase our framework in a real-world case-study for Manhattan, New York. Our results show that monetary budgets significantly limit the social justice potential of AMoD systems if they are to be deployed as transportation network companies. At the same time, granting free public transit can result in sufficiency levels very close to a completely free intermodal AMoD system, where justice-informed operations can be achieved without compromising standard efficiency metrics, ultimately highlighting the strong potential of social policies.
papers.comment: Accepted for presentation at conference IEEE ITSC 2026. This is the preprint version
papers.title_zh: 运营约束下多式联运自主按需出行系统的司法知情规划
papers.summary_zh: 迄今为止，大多数关于交通规划的研究都集中在优化收入或平均出行时间等功利指标上，这往往最终会为了利润或效率而惩罚最穷的人。与此同时，大多数交通正义研究都集中在评估不公正现象，而无法制定可操作的解决方案。本文有助于弥合这一差距，并提出了基于正义的多式联运系统运营规划的优化模型，该模型明确考虑了用户的预算和安全限制以及基础设施能力限制。具体来说，我们首先关注多式联运自主按需移动（AMoD）系统，其中自动驾驶机器人出租车与公共交通和主动模式联合提供按需移动，并通过网络流模型从介观规划角度描述其操作。其次，我们利用这些模型通过功利效率和正义目标来优化系统运行。我们在纽约曼哈顿的真实案例研究中展示了我们的框架。我们的结果表明，如果将 AMoD 系统部署为交通网络公司，货币预算会极大地限制它们的社会正义潜力。与此同时，提供免费公共交通可以使充足水平非常接近完全免费的多式联运 AMoD 系统，在该系统中可以在不影响标准效率指标的情况下实现公正的运营，最终凸显社会政策的强大潜力。

papers.title: Parallel Differentiable Reachability for Learning and Planning with Certified Neural Dynamics and Controllers
papers.summary: Neural network (NN) dynamics models and control policies achieve strong performance in robotics, but providing sound guarantees under uncertainty remains difficult, especially for closed-loop NN systems. Existing reachability tools provide formal over-approximations, yet are often non-differentiable, overly conservative, or too slow for modern learning and online planning pipelines. To address this, we present a parallelizable, differentiable reachability framework in JAX for continuous- and discrete-time systems with analytical and NN-based dynamics and controllers. Our framework combines Taylor-model flowpipe construction with CROWN-style linear bound propagation through a unified representation that preserves affine dependencies while supporting GPU-batched computation and automatic differentiation. Building on this reachability primitive, we develop (i) a certified training method that encourages reachability-friendly dynamics models and controllers, and (ii) a reachability-aware sampling-based MPC scheme with gradient-based refinement. Experiments on non-prehensile manipulation and quadrotor tasks, including hardware and higher-dimensional evaluations (up to 72D), demonstrate practical online planning while maintaining certified reachable-set over-approximations under bounded uncertainty.
papers.title_zh: 通过经过认证的神经动力学和控制器实现学习和规划的并行可微可达性
papers.summary_zh: 神经网络 (NN) 动力学模型和控制策略在机器人领域取得了优异的性能，但在不确定性下提供可靠的保证仍然很困难，特别是对于闭环神经网络系统。现有的可达性工具提供了形式上的过度近似，但对于现代学习和在线规划流程来说通常是不可微的、过于保守或太慢。为了解决这个问题，我们在 JAX 中提出了一个可并行、可微的可达性框架，适用于具有分析和基于神经网络的动力学和控制器的连续和离散时间系统。我们的框架通过统一的表示将泰勒模型流管构造与 CROWN 式线性边界传播相结合，该表示保留仿射依赖性，同时支持 GPU 批量计算和自动微分。在此可达性原语的基础上，我们开发了（i）一种经过认证的训练方法，鼓励可达性友好的动态模型和控制器，以及（ii）具有基于梯度的细化的可达性感知的基于采样的 MPC 方案。非综合操纵和四旋翼任务的实验，包括硬件和高维评估（高达 72D），展示了实用的在线规划，同时在有限不确定性下保持经过认证的可达集超近似。
